info.title: Traigent Billing — Subscription Lifecycle (Flask handlers)
info.description: Subscription read + cancel + usage statistics. Complements TraigentSchema/billing/billing_endpoints.json which covers the subscription/* resource family (catalog, current, usage-periods, usage-buckets, spend-alerts, entitlements). This file documents the Flask handlers that don't fit cleanly under those resource paths. Codex priority audit P5: split out of `billing_extra_endpoints.json`.

get.summary: Get the current user's subscription details

200.description: Current subscription details or a no-subscription marker.

post.summary: Cancel the current subscription (effective at period end)

default.description: Response shape pending — see Flask handler in TraigentBackend/src/routes/ for actual return shape; full request/response schemas tracked as follow-up.
